EF1 TORNADO. 7.5 MILE LENGTH. UP TO 120 YARDS WIDE. DEVELOPED JUST SOUTHWEST OF MAIN STREET AND MUSTANG ROAD ON THE EAST SIDE OF YUKON. TORNADO MOVED EAST-NORTHEAST AND ENDED NEAR NORTHWEST 60TH AND MERIDIAN IN NORTHWEST OKLAHOMA CITY /OR JUST EAST OF WARR ACRES/ IN OKLAHOMA COUNTY.

*** 1 INJ *** EF1 TORNADO. DAMAGE TO MOBILE HOME EAST-SOUTHEAST OF PAOLI WAS THE RESULT OF AN EF1 TORNADO. THE TORNADO PATH LIKELY EXTENDED INTO MCCLAIN COUNTY ABOUT 3 MILES WEST OF BYERS. ONE INJURY OCCURRED WHEN THE MOBILE HOME WAS MOVED OFF ITS FOUNDATION 5 MILES EAST-SOUTHEAST OF PAOLI. STORM SURVEY PERSONNEL ARE STILL INVESTIGATING THE PATH OF THIS TORNADO.
